product.name: ArWoWear T4 Static Pro
product.titleDescriptor: 64% Polyester 35% Cotton 1% Carbon Antistatic Twill Fabric, 200 gr/m'2
descriptions: ArWoWear T4 Static Pro is light weight 200 g/m², 64% Polyester 35% Cotton 1% Carbon durable workwear antistatic twill fabric.

It is suitable to use on electronic industry where static electric formation is a problem. Oil and gas industry platform workers can also use it to prevent static electric related explosions on dangerous area.
64% Polyester 35% Cotton 1% Carbon Antistatic Twill Fabric, 200 gr/m'2
technicalParameters: Fiber | 64% Polyester (PES) 35% Cotton (CO) 1% Carbon (CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
applicationImageLabels: Antistatic cotton polyester twill pant and jacket
functionIconLabels: >> ArWoWear T4 Static Pro Data Sheet

evidence: It is suitable to use on electronic industry where static electric formation is a problem. Oil and gas industry platform workers can also use it to prevent static electric related explosions on dangerous area.
matches.rationale: Explicitly stated use by oil and gas industry platform workers to prevent static-related explosions, directly tying to the energy sector, not just antistatic property alone.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antistatic twill workwear could be used in industrial settings but no explicit welding, foundry or metallurgy use is stated.
